title: Oh Ho Sanam Lyrics Dasavatharam
stanzas:
Oh Ho Sanam Lyrics Dasavatharam
#kamalhaasan #mahalakshmiiyer #vairamuthu

paattu un kadhile
thaenai vaakkum
paattu un kangalil
neerai vaakkum

udal boomikke pogattum
isai boomiyai aallattum

ho ho sanam
ho ho sanam okho..

kaattrai thiraikkum
saavithaan kaathu
kaadhai thirakkum
saavithan paattu

paattu un kadhile
thaenai vaakkum
paattu un kangalil
neerai vaakkum (2)

udal boomikke pogattum
isai boomiyai aallattum

kaattrai thiraikkum
saavithaan kaathu
kaadhai thirakkum
saavithan paattu

ho ho sanam
ho ho sanam okho..

nee enabadhai pollaadha
naan enbadhai
ondraakki naam seivadhu
paadalthaan

yaar nenjilum mirugathin
thol ulladhu
adhai maattri
aal seivadhu
paadalthaan..

kadavulum kadha saamiyum
pesi kollum mozhi paadalthaan

mannil naam vazhgira
kaalam konjam
vazhvil un suvadugal
engae minjum

enni paaradaa maanudaa
ennodu nee paadadaa

ho ho sanam
ho ho sanam okho..

poo pookudhe
adhan vazhvu
aezhu naattkale
aanaalum thaen
thandhuthaan pogudhe

nam vazhkaye
vazhnaalil yaar
thandhadhu
en nenjam nee vazhave
paadiven.

veelvadhu yaaraayinum
vazhvadhu naadaagattum

kaalam un udhadugal
moodum podhum
kaattru un
varigalai meendum
paadum

nee paadinaal
nallisai
un mounamum
mellisai..

ho ho sanam
ho ho sanam okho..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oh Ho Sanam'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the romantic theme of the movie.

How does 'Oh Ho Sanam' fit into the plot of Dasavatharam?

This song highlights the romantic relationship between the characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

Who are the singers of 'Oh Ho Sanam'?

The song features the captivating voices of Kamal Haasan and Mahalakshmi Iyer.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Oh Ho Sanam' was composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

When was 'Oh Ho Sanam' released?

The song was released on April 25, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oh Ho Sanam, the lyrical beauty and melodic charm come together to create a heartfelt expression of love. The song plays a pivotal role in Dasavatharam, showcasing the emotional connection between the lead characters. With its soothing melody and romantic lyrics, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing. This duet not only highlights the vocal prowess of Kamal Haasan and Mahalakshmi Iyer but also enhances the film's overall narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Ho Sanam from Dasavatharam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Kamal Haasan and Mahalakshmi Iyer, this song weaves a magical tapestry of emotions. The collaboration between the legendary Kamal and the talented Himesh Reshammiya makes this track a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: The song will speak sweet words in your heart, and it will bring tears to your eyes.
The body may leave, but the music will remain.
Oh ho, my beloved, oh ho..
The wind will tell stories, and the song will unfold the tale of the wind.
The song will speak sweet words in your heart, and it will bring tears to your eyes.
The body may leave, but the music will remain.
The wind will tell stories, and the song will unfold the tale of the wind.
Oh ho, my beloved, oh ho..
If you say something bad about me, I will turn it into a song.
In everyone's heart, there is a beast hidden, and it will be transformed into a song.
God and the divine will speak through the words of the song.
In this world, as we live, where are your footprints in my life?
Why do you look at me, when you should be singing with me?
Oh ho, my beloved, oh ho..
Flowers bloom, that is their life, but honey will still flow away.
In our lives, who has given us anything? I will sing with my heart for you.
Let anyone wander, let them wander freely.
When the time comes, the wind will sing your words again.
When you sing, the silence becomes music..
Oh ho, my beloved, oh ho..
